info.name: Sunbird RC - OID4VC (VCI + VP) Flows
info.description: Full OID4VCI issuance + OID4VP presentation flows against oid4vc-service, identity-service, credential-schema, and credentials-service. Run folders top-to-bottom via Collection Runner. Requires the stack up per TESTING.md (db, vault, redis, identity, credential-schema, credential, oid4vc-service).

item.name: N19 setup (c) - Impostor signs someone else's credential
6. mso_mdoc - Issuance & Verification
item.description: ISO/IEC 18013-5 mobile-document format. NOTE: mdoc *presentation* (OID4VP) is intentionally NOT covered here — it requires the wallet to build a CBOR DeviceResponse signed with COSE, which cannot be produced in a Postman sandbox. That half is covered by the self-driven e2e harness (see README §10). This folder covers mdoc issuance end-to-end plus standalone verification.

item.name: Generate mdoc issuer DID (EC P-256 / JsonWebKey2020)

Sign holder PoP JWT (stand-in for wallet)

item.name: 7. W3C VC Render Method
item.description: W3C VC Render Method (https://www.w3.org/TR/vc-render-method/). Issues a jwt_vc_json credential from a schema carrying an inline SVG render template, asserts the renderMethod entry is embedded with a digestMultibase, then fetches the hosted template and recomputes the digest to confirm it matches.

item.name: Sign holder PoP JWT (stand-in for wallet)
Fetch hosted render template + verify digest

exec: // recompute multibase (base58btc) multihash SHA-256 of the served bytes
// and compare to the credential's digestMultibase.
for (let i = 0; i < wa.sigBytes; i++) bytes.push((wa.words[i>>>2] >>> (24-(i%4)*8)) & 0xff);
for (const b of mh) { let carry = b; for (let j=0;j<digits.length;j++){ carry += digits[j]<<8; digits[j]=carry%58; carry=(carry/58)|0; } while(carry){ digits.push(carry%58); carry=(carry/58)|0; } }
for (const b of mh) { if (b===0) out+='1'; else break; }
pm.test('served template digest matches credential digestMultibase', () => {

item.name: 8. vc+sd-jwt - Issuance & Verification
item.description: IETF SD-JWT VC format with real selective disclosure. Issues, confirms the credential is an SD-JWT (contains '~' disclosure separators), and verifies it.
